products.title: Charcoal Facial Cleanser
products.alt: Charcoal Facial Cleanser — detoxifying face wash
products.description: Detoxifying face wash that pulls pore-clogging impurities with activated charcoal, without stripping your skin.

expand.about: A gentle daily cleanser built around activated charcoal, aloe vera, and vitamin E. Lifts out daily buildup, sweat, and excess oil while tea tree oil supports blemish-prone skin. Good for oily, combination and congested skin types.
benefits: Calms and conditions with aloe vera
Tea tree oil for blemish-prone skin
facts: Activated Charcoal, Tea Tree Oil, Vitamin E

products.title: Hyaluronic Acid Serum
products.alt: Hyaluronic Acid Serum — multi-weight hydration serum
products.description: Four weights of hyaluronic acid, each targeting a different skin layer for plump, bouncy hydration.

expand.about: A lightweight water-based serum featuring four different molecular weights of hyaluronic acid and its derivatives. Each type pulls moisture into a different layer, so skin stays hydrated through the day instead of dehydrated by mid-afternoon. Safe for all skin types including sensitive.
benefits: Multi-weight hyaluronic acid for deeper hydration
Plumps fine lines caused by dehydration
Sinks in fast, no sticky finish
facts: AM and PM, on damp skin

products.title: Vitamin C Serum
products.alt: Vitamin C Serum — brightening and antioxidant
products.description: Triple-form vitamin C with ferulic acid to brighten tone, fade dark spots and defend against daily damage.

expand.about: A brightening serum powered by three forms of vitamin C — L-ascorbic acid for potency, plus magnesium ascorbyl phosphate and 3-glyceryl ascorbate for stability. Ferulic acid amplifies the antioxidant shield, while calendula and chamomile keep the formula kind to the skin.
benefits: Evens out dark spots and uneven tone
Antioxidant defence vs pollution & UV stress
facts: AM — always layer sunscreen over it

products.title: Dark Spot Serum for Sensitive Skin
products.alt: Dark Spot Serum for Sensitive Skin — gentle tone correction
products.description: Brightens without brightening acids. Adaptogenic mushroom extracts even tone on reactive skin.

expand.about: A gentle dark-spot serum designed for skin that reacts badly to kojic acid, strong acids, or hydroquinone. Adaptogenic mushrooms (shiitake, turkey tail) plus jackfruit and rice extract fade uneven tone over time, while chamomile and calendula keep things calm.
benefits: Safe for sensitive and reactive skin

products.title: PDRN Brightening Serum
products.alt: PDRN Brightening Serum — K-beauty inspired radiance
products.description: K-beauty inspired PDRN, peptides and hyaluronic acid for a glassy, lit-from-within glow.

expand.about: PDRN (polydeoxyribonucleotide) is a regenerative ingredient from Korean skincare, often used in aesthetic clinics. Paired here with Acetyl Hexapeptide-8 and sodium hyaluronate in a lightweight hydrating base that absorbs fast and leaves skin looking plump and radiant.

products.title: Skin Hydration Cream
products.alt: Skin Hydration Cream — lightweight daily moisturiser
products.description: Lightweight moisturiser with hyaluronic acid, avocado oil and vitamin E. The finishing step in any routine.

expand.about: A daily moisturiser that seals in whatever you layered before. Hyaluronic acid pulls water into the skin, avocado oil and vitamin E keep the barrier happy, and a cool cucumber note makes it pleasant to use morning or night.
facts: Hyaluronic Acid, Avocado Oil, Vitamin E

products.title: Anti-Aging Moisturizer
products.alt: Anti-Aging Moisturizer — retinol, peptides and ceramides
products.description: Retinol, peptides and ceramides in a rich daily cream. Smooths fine lines without sensitising skin.

expand.about: A multi-active anti-aging moisturiser. Encapsulated retinol supports cell turnover, Acetyl Octapeptide-3 softens the look of expression lines, and ceramide NP plus shea butter keep the barrier strong so you can use actives without irritation. Designed for mature and maturing skin.
facts: PM only — layer SPF in the AM

products.title: Skin Firming Cream
products.alt: Skin Firming Cream — DMAE and CoQ10 treatment
products.description: DMAE, hyaluronic acid and CoQ10 work together on the look of firmness, bounce and tone.

expand.about: A focused firming cream for skin that's starting to lose snap. DMAE visibly tightens, hyaluronic acid plumps, and Coenzyme Q10 brings antioxidant support. Avocado and almond oils round out the texture so it feels more like a treat than a treatment.

products.title: Gua Sha Face Oil
products.alt: Gua Sha Face Oil — botanical facial oil
products.description: Twelve botanical oils in one silky blend. Perfect slip for gua sha, great on its own at night.

expand.about: A blend of twelve cold-pressed botanical oils — including rosehip, grapeseed, camellia, pomegranate and baobab — that delivers antioxidants and fatty acids where skin wants them. Light enough for daily use, slippy enough for gua sha, facial massage or jade roller.
benefits: Smooth slip for gua sha and massage
facts: PM as last step, or before gua sha

products.title: Aloe & Tea Tree Radiance Gel
products.alt: Aloe & Tea Tree Radiance Gel — soothing spot-friendly gel
products.description: Cooling aloe gel with tea tree and willow bark. Calms redness and visibly reduces blemishes.

expand.about: A soothing leave-on gel built for skin that breaks out easily. Aloe vera and cucumber calm redness on contact, black willow bark (nature's salicylic acid) works on blemishes, and tea tree oil supports clarity. Use all over or as a targeted spot treatment.
facts: Aloe Vera, Tea Tree Oil, Black Willow Bark
AM/PM or as a spot treatment

products.title: Peppermint Coffee Scrub
products.description: Organic coffee grounds, brown sugar and peppermint oil. Wakes up dull skin and boosts circulation.

expand.about: A body scrub that smells like your favourite Monday morning. Fresh-ground organic coffee is loaded with antioxidants, sugar and sea salt buff away dullness, and peppermint oil gives that cool, tingly finish. Great for cellulite-prone zones and tired-looking legs.
facts: Organic Coffee, Brown Sugar, Peppermint Oil

products.title: Peptide Hair Growth Serum
products.alt: Peptide Hair Growth Serum — scalp and hair treatment
products.description: Five peptides plus rosemary and saw palmetto. Nourishes the scalp for fuller, healthier-looking hair.

expand.about: A leave-in scalp serum built around five biomimetic peptides (sh-Polypeptide-11, sh-Polypeptide-1, sh-Oligopeptide-2, sh-Oligopeptide-10, sh-Polypeptide-9) plus rosemary, saw palmetto and ginseng. Lightweight and non-greasy — massages into the scalp and absorbs fast with no sticky residue.
benefits: Nourishes the scalp at the root
Rosemary and saw palmetto for scalp health
